name: Tomato Herb Vinaigrette
card_uses: Spoon it over a rice bowl.
Thin it for fish or chicken.
Let white beans sit in it.
ingredients: Optional: 1 small garlic clove, finely grated
method: Combine the tomato, olive oil, sherry vinegar, salt, and optional garlic in a bowl. Stir once. Taste and adjust — more vinegar if it needs brightness, more oil if it needs body. Leave it rough. Tear in basil when you use it.

storage.note: Refrigerate promptly. Add fresh basil when serving.

uses.label: Rice bowl
uses.context: Keep the tomato chunks visible. The texture belongs on top.

uses.label: Salmon or chicken
uses.context: Stir in a little more olive oil or vinegar. It should drizzle rather than sit.

uses.label: Burrata or sourdough
uses.context: Use it as-is with larger tomato pieces. Spoon generously and let it pool.

uses.label: Pasta
uses.context: Add after the heat is off. Toss until the pasta is coated, then let it rest for a minute.

uses.label: White beans
uses.context: Spoon over beans and give them a few minutes before eating. They absorb the vinegar and oil as they sit.
